scripts.test: script -q /dev/null node --test 'lib/**/test/test*.js' 'lib/*.test.js' 2>&1 | awk '/ℹ (tests|suites|pass|fail|cancelled|skipped|todo|duration)/{buf=buf $0 ORS; next} {print} END{printf buf}'
scripts.lint:learnings: ! grep -rl 'TODO: Fill in' lib/*/base/*/LEARNINGS.md 2>/dev/null | grep . && echo 'All LEARNINGS.md filled in' || (echo 'FAIL: Unfilled LEARNINGS.md found:' && grep -rl 'TODO: Fill in' lib/*/base/*/LEARNINGS.md && exit 1)
